videos.title: UK | 20th May, Wednesday - RIFT Training with Shavez
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 20th May, Wednesday - RIFT Training with Shavez 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Avalanche Mistakes Lead to Golden Knights Goals in Game 1 Loss
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Mistakes Lead to Golden Knights Goals in Game 1 Loss Colorado Avalanche undone by self-inflicted wounds in Western Conference Finals Game 1. Despite a flurry of high-danger chances and 38 shots on net, the Avs fall 4-2 to the Vegas Golden Knights as costly mistakes and missed opportunities haunt their playoff run. Can the Avalanche regroup and find the discipline needed to turn the series in their favor?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Carter Hart’s stellar goaltending, Ross Colton’s controversial penalty, and Nathan MacKinnon’s highlight-reel assist that gave the Avalanche life. Discussions spotlight Vegas’ defensive structure, the Avs’ erratic shot accuracy, and the critical absence of Cale Makar. With Brett Kulak’s under-the-radar performance and Valeri Nichushkin’s creative goal, the episode explores what Colorado must adjust ahead of Game 2. Will the Avalanche capitalize on their chances next time, or are the Golden Knights in control of the series momentum?

videos.title: Hindi | 20th May, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 20th May, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: The Problem With Constant Snacking
videos.summary_source_text:
The Problem With Constant Snacking Today’s food supply exposes the body to far more chemicals, additives, and processed ingredients than ever before. One of the simplest ways to lower that toxic load is not constantly eating throughout the day. Cutting out snacks and reducing how often food is consumed can significantly decrease the amount of toxins entering the body on a daily basis. Sometimes the healthiest change is not adding more, but finally giving the body a break.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.


About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. Google’s New Omni And Spark Just Changed AI Forever Google just made its biggest AI move yet. Gemini 3.5 Flash is faster and cheaper than many frontier models, Gemini Omni brings realistic AI video creation and editing, Gemini Spark works in the background as a personal AI agent, and Antigravity turns coding into an agent-powered workflow. Google is no longer just adding AI to apps. It is turning Gemini into a full layer across Search, Chrome, YouTube, Docs, Android, and your digital life.

videos.title: How To Keep Momentum After Contact
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Keep Momentum After Contact The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini 3.5 Flash Explained: 4X FASTER, 72% Fewer Tokens & BEATS GPT-5.5?! 🔗 TRACKING LINK: https://links.outskill.com/LEGEA
📱 QR CODE: https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=200x200&data=https%3A%2F%2Flinks.outskill.com%2FLEGEA

Google just dropped Gemini 3.5 Flash — and the numbers are insane. 4X faster than other frontier models, 72% fewer tokens used, a 1 MILLION token context window, and it BEATS Google's own Gemini 3.1 Pro on almost every benchmark. But does it actually beat ChatGPT, Claude, and Grok in the real world?

In this video, I break down everything you need to know about Gemini 3.5 Flash — what's new, the benchmark numbers nobody's talking about, real-world pricing, the limitations Google is hiding, and exactly which AI model you should actually use for your workflow in 2026.

By the end, you'll know if Gemini 3.5 Flash is hype or the real deal — and which use cases it actually wins at.

🔥 KEY NUMBERS COVERED:
✅ 4X faster than other frontier models
✅ 1,000,000 token context window
✅ 76.2% on Terminal-Bench (vs 58% for Gemini 3 Flash)
✅ 83.6% on MCP Atlas (beats Claude 4.7)
✅ 72.1% on ARC-AGI-2 (more than DOUBLE the previous score)
✅ $1.50 / $9 per million tokens (cheaper than GPT-4 Turbo)
✅ 42% better than Flash 3 — using 72% FEWER tokens

🎯 WHO WINS WHAT:
🔹 Gemini 3.5 Flash → Speed, multimodal, agentic apps
🔹 ChatGPT → Ecosystem & reliability
🔹 Claude → Factuality & safety-critical work
🔹 Grok → Quick, web-aware answers

This Simple Food Transforms Your Body in 5 Days What would happen if you ate only sardines for 5 days? This might sound extreme, but the results can be surprising.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4dHGVyz

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

With zero carbs and zero sugar, your body quickly shifts from burning sugar to burning fat. Within the first day, you begin producing ketones, a powerful fuel source that supports brain function and fat loss.

By the end of the five days, your body becomes more efficient at using fat for fuel, which can help stabilize energy levels throughout the day. Many people also notice reduced cravings and a stronger sense of control over their appetite. This kind of reset can give you insight into how your body responds to simple, nutrient-dense foods.

Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book "The Healthy Keto Plan" and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: Before You Take Turmeric Again, Watch This | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Before You Take Turmeric Again, Watch This | Dr. Mandell What if one of the most powerful natural compounds for calming inflammation has been sitting in your kitchen this whole time? In this video, I reveal how turmeric, and specifically its active compound curcumin, may help support a healthier inflammatory response throughout the body. Chronic inflammation has been linked to joint stiffness, aches, brain fog, fatigue, digestive issues, circulation problems, and accelerated aging. I’ll explain the physiology behind why inflammation makes you feel older, how turmeric works inside the body, and most importantly, how to absorb it properly so you actually get the benefits. If you wake up stiff, feel sluggish, or notice your body just doesn’t recover like it used to, this is something you’ll want to understand. Small daily habits can make a big difference when you calm inflammation at its source.

videos.title: Google I/O 2026 Explained: Gemini 3.5, Omni, Spark & The Agent Takeover
videos.summary_source_text:
Google I/O 2026 Explained: Gemini 3.5, Omni, Spark & The Agent Takeover Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Google I/O 2026 just changed the AI game — and most people are completely missing why. In this deep dive, I break down every major announcement from Google I/O 2026, from the new Gemini 3.5 Flash and Gemini Omni models to the agent platforms (Spark, Antigravity), the Universal Cart that shops for you, AI Studio's app-generation magic, and the creator tools reshaping Flow and Workspace.

By the end, you'll know exactly which features you can use TODAY, which to wait on, and which one is quietly going to change how you work.

🎯 WHAT YOU'LL LEARN:
✅ Why Gemini 3.5 Flash is a massive leap (1M token context, 4x faster inference)
✅ How Gemini Omni cracks character consistency in AI video generation
✅ What Gemini Spark actually does (and why it's not just another chatbot)
✅ How Universal Cart + AP2 protocol could replace your Amazon habit
✅ Why Google Antigravity is the "Xcode for AI agents"
✅ How AI Studio now generates full Android apps from a single prompt
✅ The $2M Build with Gemini XPRIZE Hackathon — and how to enter

⏱️ CHAPTERS:
00:00 The Moment Google Stopped Making Chatbots
01:22 Major AI Models: Gemini 3.5 and Gemini Omni
04:00 Agentic AI in Google Apps and Services
07:45 Shopping and Commerce: Universal Cart
10:21 Developer Tools: Antigravity, Gemini API, AI Studio
13:38 Media, Creativity and Workspace
15:15 Takeaways and What This Means

🔗 USEFUL LINKS:
- Google AI Studio: https://aistudio.google.com
- Gemini API Docs: https://ai.google.dev
- Google Antigravity: https://antigravity.google
- Build with Gemini XPRIZE: https://www.xprize.org

Which announcement surprised you the most — Spark, Universal Cart, or AI Studio's app generation? Drop it in the comments. I'm planning a follow-up on whichever one gets the most interest.

👍 If this saved you hours of digging through keynote replays, hit the like button — it genuinely helps the channel.

videos.title: Jag tror på forskningen men har en aktiv fond som gått bra
videos.summary_source_text:
Jag tror på forskningen men har en aktiv fond som gått bra Av Europas globalfonder som låg i topp-kvartilen 2021 är 1,22 % kvar i topp-kvartilen 2025 — alltså en fond av åttiotvå. 35 % av topp-fonderna slogs ihop eller lades ned under perioden. Och kanske mest kontraintuitivt: 21 % av fonderna i botten-halvan 2015–2020 klättrade upp till topp-halvan 2020–2025, mer än de 16 % som faktiskt stannade kvar i toppen.

Det är ett av de starkaste argumenten för bred billig indexfond eller fondrobot framför att försöka välja "rätt" aktiv förvaltare.
Källa: S&P Dow Jones Indices, Europe Persistence Scorecard, år-slut 2025 (publicerad maj 2026). Rapporten täcker alla aktivt förvaltade fonder i Europa och rensar för survivorship bias.

#shorts #privatekonomi #ekonomi #fonder #indexfond #spara #investera #aktivforvaltning #fondrobot #börsen #pension #SPIVA Av Europas globalfonder som låg i topp-kvartilen 2021 är 1,22 % kvar i topp-kvartilen 2025 — alltså en fond av åttiotvå. 35 % av topp-fonderna slogs ihop eller lades ned under perioden. Och kanske mest kontraintuitivt: 21 % av fonderna i botten-halvan 2015–2020 klättrade upp till topp-halvan 2020–2025, mer än de 16 % som faktiskt stannade kvar i toppen.

Det är ett av de starkaste argumenten för bred billig indexfond eller fondrobot framför att försöka välja "rätt" aktiv förvaltare.
Källa: S&P Dow Jones Indices, Europe Persistence Scorecard, år-slut 2025 (publicerad maj 2026). Rapporten täcker alla aktivt förvaltade fonder i Europa och rensar för survivorship bias.

While traditional SaaS gross margin remains high with more users, AI pricing introduces unique costs like tokens and GPUs that can erode profitability. Understanding these nuances is key to avoiding an ai startup failure and ensuring your growth is sustainable. 🚀

videos.title: The BEST Putter Odyssey Has Ever Made?
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST Putter Odyssey Has Ever Made? Rick Shiels gets his hands on the new Odyssey Damascus Milled Putters, and it's unlike anything Odyssey have released before. From the material to the feel to the price, this putter raises the bar for everyone else — and we break down exactly why.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.
Rick Shiels gets his hands on the new Odyssey Damascus Milled Putter Lineup, and it's unlike anything Odyssey have released before. From the material to the feel to the price, this putter raises the bar for everyone else — and we break down exactly why.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.

95% Of Amateurs Instantly Improve With This New Move! #shorts #golf #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

Golf downswing lower body drills for senior golfers — fix trail leg, activate hips, and shift weight correctly with these 2 simple golf drills.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available! 
📞 Call or text us at ‪(610) 756-7730‬ to discuss if our golf schools are a good fit for you. ‬‬

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• Fix your golf downswing by mastering the two things your trail leg must do — move forward and rotate
• Master the Finish Line Drill — get your trail knee to the ball line before your hands
• Eliminate the stuck lower body move that kills the senior golf swing — for good
• Unlock hip rotation in the golf swing without lead-side feels — trail-side is easier and more effective
• Use the Fence Drill to keep your trail leg inside the toe line and stop standing up through impact
• Apply the add-on golf drill to feel your hips driving the downswing — just a club or a chair required
• Learn the lower body sequence that solved a decade of weight shift problems — in minutes

Eric Cogorno has coached golfers at every level and consistently finds that activating the trail side is the fastest path to better golf swing mechanics for players over 50. In this video, he breaks down trail leg function using real-time Swing Coach App golf swing analysis so you can see exactly what your lower body is doing — and fix it rep by rep. If you struggle with power, consistency, or weight shift, this is one of the most practical golf lessons you'll watch this year.

videos.title: Movement Is a Skill — Not Just Exercise
videos.summary_source_text:
Movement Is a Skill — Not Just Exercise Movement is not only about exercise. It is also a skill.
Just like learning an instrument or a language, the body can learn more efficient, coordinated, and comfortable ways of moving.
In this video, I explore why movement is a skill — and why this changes everything for people who have been trying to force progress through effort alone.

If you’d like to explore this more deeply, I’ve created a free guided somatic session here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass
 
If you’d like personal support, you’re welcome to book a one-on-one Zoom call with me here: https://calendly.com/taroiwamoto/45min

If you feel ready for deeper, more structured support, you can learn more about my course here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

About Taro Iwamoto
I help self-aware adults who are exhausted by recurring pain, tension, and fear cycles despite everything they’ve tried, and who are ready to stop chasing fixes and follow a deeper somatic, nervous-system-based path to lasting change, so they can trust their body again and fully live their life with ease, freedom, and confidence.

Did you know this about Tour Players clubs 🤯 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.

videos.title: Porsche should be TERRIFIED of this NEW AMG!
videos.summary_source_text:
Porsche should be TERRIFIED of this NEW AMG! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-20-05

This is the new Mercedes-AMG GT 4-Door Coupe… and it’s gone ELECTRIC! 

Mat’s over in Germany getting hands-on with this all-new AMG, and he’s about to find out just how similar it is to last year’s AMG GT XX Concept. So let’s dive in… 

Starting with the exterior design, there’s no denying that on first impression, it’s clearly an evolution of the previous AMG GT 4-Door. Up front, there’s a huge grille, which in this instance includes LED ‘slats’ running across it. There’s an aggressive-looking front bumper, and the grille is flanked by updated headlights with the 3-pointed star design included in each. Along the side, there are 21-inch alloys and a sloping roofline that’s lower than the previous car. Around the back, there are yet more 3-pointed star lights, a large diffuser, and an active rear diffuser and spoiler! 

The inside of the car is distinctly an AMG. It comes with the AMG sports steering wheel with configurable driving modes, and there’s a huge digital driver's display and infotainment screen, as well as a third screen for the passenger. The cabin is incredibly well built with soft-touch or carbon fibre materials throughout, and the seats are solid yet incredibly comfortable. 

The new GT 4-Door Coupe comes with three electric motors that combine to produce an incredible 1,169hp at the top end! Even in its lowest setting, it can put down 1,000hp, so it’s an incredibly powerful beast. It comes with 106kWh batteries that were developed alongside the Mercedes F1 team, and it’s good for a range of 440 miles on a single charge. In terms of acceleration, it can hit 60mph in just 2.4 seconds - but that’s 0.1 seconds slower than the most powerful Porsche Taycan! 

In terms of price, the new GT 4-Door starts from around £120,000, rising up to around £190,000 for the top-of-the-range models! So is it set to be the best 4-door performance car money can buy? You’ll need to stick with Mat and see for yourself!

videos.title: UK | 19th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 19th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: CROSSOVER: A Ticket to the Stanley Cup Final Is On the Line for the Avalanche and Golden Knights
videos.summary_source_text:
CROSSOVER: A Ticket to the Stanley Cup Final Is On the Line for the Avalanche and Golden Knights The Vegas Golden Knights face off against the Colorado Avalanche in a high-stakes Western Conference Final packed with storylines and uncertainty. Can Jack Eichel and Mitch Marner overcome locker room drama, Mark Stone’s questionable health, and off-ice distractions—including John Tortorella’s infamous playoff fine—to carry Vegas past Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, and a stacked Avalanche squad?

Chris Micieli and Tony Cordasco break down goaltending battles between Carter Hart and Scott Wedgewood, dissect the impact of injuries and coaching pressure on both teams, and spotlight key contributors like Pavel Dorofeyev, Tomas Hertl, and Logan O’Connor. From special teams strategy to depth questions and X-factors, the series promises physicality, speed, and chess-like line matchups. Predictions fly as both hosts debate whose depth and resilience will decide this playoff showdown. Will Colorado’s window widen, or can Vegas defy the odds once again?

videos.title: Why So Many Heart Attacks Get Missed
videos.summary_source_text:
Why So Many Heart Attacks Get Missed Most heart attacks are not dramatic movie scenes with crushing chest pain. Many happen quietly, with symptoms people brush off as heartburn, indigestion, dizziness, or shortness of breath. That is why so many get missed until serious damage has already occurred. The biggest misconception is believing there will always be a clear warning sign before something serious happens. 

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . videos.title: Aaron Rai wins the PGA, TOUR Pros grade their seasons | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
Aaron Rai wins the PGA, TOUR Pros grade their seasons | The Drop The Drop reacts to Aaron Rai’s victory at the PGA Championship, as hosts Alexandra O’Laughlin and Matt Every return to the studio after being onsite at Aronimink Golf Club all week for the year’s second major. We break down Rai’s triumph and put it in historical context. We also break down a week that could have been for Rory McIlroy, and why Matt says he is poised to add to his career major total in the not-too-distant future. Finally before moving on, we pay tribute to an incredible venue that successfully challenged the world’s top players. A look ahead to this week’s CJ CUP Byron Nelson focuses on defending champion Scottie Scheffler and how last year’s victory was both challenging and meaningful. As the TOUR season crosses the halfway point, we went out to the course to ask players to give themselves a midseason grade. Finally, hear about the PGA Champion’s humble beginnings, as Aaron Rai talks about his upbringing and the circumstances that led to his unique two-gloved style of play.

00:00 Introduction
00:33 Aaron Rai wins 2026 PGA Championship
04:31 Reactions to Aronimink Golf Club
07:18 Preview of THE CJ CUP Byrson Nelson
09:04 Scottie Scheffler’s Emotional Win in 2025 
13:42 PGA TOUR Players Grade Their Seasons So Far
17:52 Looking Back at Taylor Pendrith’s 2024 Win
18:38 Updated FedExCup Standings 
19:00 Why Aaron Rai Wears Two Gloves  
20:06 Outro

videos.title: How To Pull Matthew Schaefer's Ballsy Move
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Pull Matthew Schaefer's Ballsy Move The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

videos.title: GPT-5.5 vs Claude Opus 4.7: I Tested Both So You Don't Have To (Honest Verdict)
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-5.5 vs Claude Opus 4.7: I Tested Both So You Don't Have To (Honest Verdict) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Five GPT-vs-Claude videos this week, five different "winners," and you STILL don't know which to pay for? I stopped guessing and pulled the official docs, real benchmark numbers, and actual pricing pages. Here's the truth nobody's saying: there's no single winner — there's a winner for YOUR workflow, and most people pick wrong.

In this video I break down GPT-5.5 vs Claude Opus 4.7 across benchmarks, hallucination rates, pricing, and the tool ecosystems around each — then run both LIVE so you see the difference instead of taking my word for it.

What we cover:
- The ecosystem bet that explains every other difference (Swiss Army knife vs. chef's knife)
- What's actually under the hood — and what neither lab will tell you
- The benchmark receipts: GDPval, OSWorld-Verified, BrowseComp, FrontierMath, MCP Atlas
- The hallucination plot twist — the single most important section for real work
- GPT-5.5 live demo: hands-off market research with web search
- Claude Opus 4.7 live demo: memory that survives across a task
- The pricing reality: why long-context work can cost HALF on one platform
- My honest verdict — and why it's not "one model to rule them all"


CHAPTERS
00:00 — Intro: Why Every Comparison Video Is Confusing You

videos.title: Hair Falling Out?  Take This First | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Hair Falling Out?  Take This First | Dr. Mandell Noticing more hair in the shower, on your pillow, or in your brush? Hair loss is not always just about age or genetics. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains some of the most common hidden reasons your hair may be thinning, including DHT, the hormone linked to shrinking hair follicles, chronic stress, elevated cortisol, blood sugar imbalance, inflammation, poor circulation, nutrient deficiencies, thyroid dysfunction, and more. We also discuss why pumpkin seed oil has gained attention as a natural first step for supporting healthier hair growth, along with other important strategies that may help protect your follicles before more shedding occurs. Whether your hair loss is gradual or sudden, understanding the root cause is critical. Your body gives warning signs for a reason. The sooner you address the underlying physiology, the better your chances of supporting stronger, healthier hair naturally. Watch until the end so you understand what may really be happening beneath the surface.

videos.title: GPT Finance Explained: The "+127% ROI" Claim, Investigated
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT Finance Explained: The "+127% ROI" Claim, Investigated Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
You opened an investing app to ask one simple question — "is this stock any good?" — and twenty minutes later you're still drowning in jargon. GPT Finance promises to fix that. But there's a "+127% ROI" figure on its site, and a secret hiding in the name itself — and together they change how you should judge this entire product.

In this breakdown I cover what GPT Finance (YourGPT Finance) actually is, the pricing (free, €9.95, €17.90/mo), the big self-reported numbers — user counts, waitlist figures, and that +127% ROI claim — why AI finance tools are exploding right now, who it competes against (FinChat, Robinhood Cortex, Bloomberg, AlphaSense), and the honest bull-and-bear verdict.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
00:00 - The secret in the name
01:02 - AI-Powered Financial Analysis
03:33 - Why AI Finance Tools Are Emerging Now
05:02 - Direct And Indirect Competitors
06:26 - Wins On Simplicity. Trails On Trust.
07:40 - The Acquisition Funnel
08:53 - Retention Is The Whole Game
09:53 - Bull Case Vs. Bear Case
11:00 - Watch: Trust • Retention • Distribution

🔎 What I cover:
- Is GPT Finance legit, or just another hyped AI chatbot?
- The "+127% ROI" claim — and why inconsistent numbers matter in a finance product

Enjoy your golf!!

Golf needs this…🗣️ More life, more fun, more realness. This is Grass League. Golf needs this…🗣️

More life, more fun, more realness.

Trey was one of the first to win at Grass Clippings Rolling Hills before it was what it is today.

And 8 year old with a dream, turned college pro, (Jon Rahm’s teammate to be exact), turned into stepping away for 10 years.

Now, he’s back.

Special thanks to Trey & Todd.

videos.title: Vilket råd skulle du ge dig själv på studenten? | RikaTillsammans
videos.summary_source_text:
Vilket råd skulle du ge dig själv på studenten? | RikaTillsammans Vilket råd skulle du ge dig själv på studenten? Jag ställde frågan i RikaTillsammans-forumet förra veckan och fick över 40 svar — från det skämtsamma ("Köp Nvidia!") till det nästan vemodiga (att lyssna på morfars och farmors livsberättelser innan det är för sent). När jag läste igenom dem slog det mig att de flesta råden, oavsett ton, handlar om samma sak: tid.

I den här reflekterar jag över de svar som fastnade särskilt — och mitt eget råd till 19-åriga Jan.

videos.title: FINALLY! At Long Last the Carolina Hurricanes have Their Eastern Conference Final Opponent
videos.summary_source_text:
FINALLY! At Long Last the Carolina Hurricanes have Their Eastern Conference Final Opponent At long last, the Eastern Conference Final is set. The Carolina Hurricanes will take on the Montreal Canadiens for the third time in the playoffs since relocation. While the 2025-26 regular season stats don't matter, what can the Hurricanes learn from those games and make adjustments to get the series win and move on to the Stanley Cup Final? It's a preview before the crossover series preview! On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes can learn from their mistakes during the regular season against the Canadiens and use that to take a playoff series win. Luckily for the Hurricanes, they're 2-0 in the playoffs against the Habs since 2002. Can they make it 3 for 3? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how the Hurricanes have done so far this postseason and how he feels good heading into the Eastern Conference Final. While it won't be easy, the optimism is high at LO Hurricanes. Finally, Zach concludes the show by giving a small "what to look for" ahead of Game 1 on Thursday. While there will be a crossover with Locked On Canadiens, it's never too early to look ahead to another playoff series for the Hurricanes. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports

• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

Most golfers struggle with consistency because they’re violating the single most important fundamental in golf — standing the correct distance away from the ball. In this video, we break down why proper setup distance affects everything from club path and swing plane to clubface control and ball striking. If you’ve been battling slices, steep swings, or inconsistent contact, this lesson could completely change your game.

You’ll learn why being too close to the golf ball destroys swing mechanics, how setup changes from wedges to driver, and the exact checkpoints used by experienced instructors after thousands of golf lessons. This video also explains how proper spacing creates a more repeatable golf swing and helps you strike the ball cleaner with every club in the bag.

Whether you’re a beginner golfer or an experienced player looking to improve consistency, these golf setup fundamentals will help you build a more reliable swing, hit higher quality shots, and lower your scores!

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4dIUoWQ

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

There’s a critical 2-hour window every night that plays a major role in how a child grows, and most kids are completely missing it.

Within the first 90 minutes of deep sleep, the body releases a powerful surge of growth hormone, the key hormone responsible for height and development.

But certain everyday habits can block this process. Small adjustments can make a big difference over time.

Your Body NEEDS This Mineral With Salt (Most People Are Deficient) Did you know there’s one critical mineral you must consume with salt, yet most people are seriously deficient in it?

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/43gR9ju

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

This mineral plays a major role in preventing calcium from building up inside your arteries, which can lead to artery hardening, cardiovascular disease, and even heart attacks. But that’s not all.

When your body lacks this nutrient, calcium can start depositing in the wrong places, including your joints, which may lead to morning stiffness, joint pain, and reduced mobility.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: UK | 18th May -Ep 8  The Rise of AI Trading Infrastructure & Why Manual Trading Is Becoming Obsolete
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 18th May -Ep 8  The Rise of AI Trading Infrastructure & Why Manual Trading Is Becoming Obsolete In Episode 8 of RIFT Before You Quit, we dive deep into one of the biggest transformations happening in global finance today — the rise of AI-driven market infrastructure and the decline of purely manual trading.

This episode explores how modern financial markets are no longer dominated by emotional human reactions, but by structured systems, algorithmic execution, intelligent infrastructure, and AI-assisted market participation.

We break down the evolution of trading from manual execution to automated systems, supported by real market data, institutional trends, and the growing dominance of algorithmic participation across equities, forex, commodities, and crypto markets.

Topics covered in this episode include:

✅ Why manual trading is steadily declining
✅ The rise of AI-driven execution systems
✅ How algorithmic trading evolved from 12% market share to over 90%
✅ Why execution speed and structure now matter more than signals
✅ Human latency vs machine execution
✅ How institutional systems process trades in milliseconds
✅ The difference between emotional trading and structured execution
✅ Why consistency and repeatability outperform prediction
✅ AI, quantitative systems, and liquidity algorithms explained
✅ The role of discipline, scalability, and execution architecture in modern finance
✅ Why emotional trading struggles against automated infrastructure
✅ The future of intelligent capital participation
✅ How the RIFT Auto Trading Engine aligns with the next generation of market infrastructure
✅ Why structure is becoming the true edge in trading

This episode also revisits key concepts discussed throughout the series, including:

Structured participation
Flow diversification
Capital allocation logic
Risk management
Automated execution environments
Consistency as a compounding advantage

Using institutional market research and real-world industry trends, Episode 8 explains why the future of trading belongs to intelligent systems capable of adaptive execution, disciplined participation, and scalable infrastructure.

You’ll also learn:
📊 How AI is actually used in financial markets
📊 Why modern systems focus on probability and execution efficiency
📊 How quantitative firms and institutional players operate
📊 Why markets increasingly reward structure over emotion
📊 The growing gap between retail execution and institutional infrastructure

The episode highlights how RIFT is designed around this evolution through:

AI-supported infrastructure
Structured capital flows
Automated execution behavior
Diversified trading flows
Consistent participation frameworks
System-driven scalability

As financial markets continue evolving, this episode provides a powerful insight into where the industry is heading — and why intelligent infrastructure is becoming essential for long-term participation.

🔥 If you want to understand the future of trading, algorithmic execution, and AI-powered market systems, this is an episode you cannot miss.

📌 Next Episode Preview (Episode 9):

Hedge fund positioning
Institutional risk management
Smart money behavior
Liquidity hunting
Portfolio balancing
Capital protection systems
Why institutions think differently from retail traders

Thank you for being part of the RIFT Before You Quit series.

Be sure to like, comment, subscribe, and turn on notifications so you never miss the next episode. videos.title: Hindi | 18th May Monday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 18th May Monday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Who's Ready To Step Up and Break Out Against Vegas?
videos.summary_source_text:
Who's Ready To Step Up and Break Out Against Vegas? Colorado Avalanche seek game-changers in pivotal playoff showdown with Vegas Golden Knights. Can stars like Nathan MacKinnon and Cale Makar elevate their play, or will unsung heroes such as Brock Nelson, Valeri Nichushkin, and Logan O’Connor seize the moment? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson offer sharp analysis of player performances, highlight who needs to step up, and debate which depth pieces could be difference-makers in this high-stakes series.

Position-by-position breakdowns put Colorado’s forward lines under the microscope, with key comparisons to Vegas’ offensive threats, including Jack Eichel and Mitch Marner. The hosts dig into advanced stats, discuss the impact of altitude at Ball Arena, and examine why analytics and matchup graphics overwhelmingly favor the Avalanche. Could this be the series that propels Colorado toward another Stanley Cup run, or will Vegas’ physicality and star power tip the balance? Don’t miss this playoff preview packed with insight and bold predictions.

videos.title: One Chat App for All My Agents: Open WebUI
videos.summary_source_text:
One Chat App for All My Agents: Open WebUI 👑 Premium Community: https://mrc.fm/premium

I've ended up with AI agents all over the place. Hermes looks after my health data, my OpenClaw crew runs my socials, my calendar and a stack of automations, and I've got local models humming away on a Mac Studio. The problem? They all live in different apps, terminals and dashboards.

So in this stream I'm fixing that. I'm setting up Open WebUI as one clean chat app that ties the whole lot together. I link it straight to my Hermes agent and my OpenClaw agents, point it at my own local models (a 32B Qwen and GPT OSS 120B running on the Mac Studio, zero cloud), turn it into a proper app on my phone, and even give it a real terminal so a model can run code and build things for me.

By the end I've got one place to talk to every agent, fire off automations, check my calendar and poke at my home network. Built live, on my own kit, start to finish. Come hang out and build it with me.

00:00 Intro: Unifying scattered AI agents with Open WebUI
01:22 Testing local models (Qwen 3.6 & GPT-OSS)
04:35 Switching to Hermes agent & persistent chat threads
06:24 Running Open WebUI on iPhone (PWA & dictate mode)
13:31 Attempting web search & using Claude Code to set it up
21:52 Exploring calendars and scheduled automations
28:58 Success: Local model performing a live web search
31:31 Updating the AI agent's long-term memory with search results
34:52 Setting up daily web-scraping automations
36:29 Open Terminal: Running Claude Code inside the browser
38:11 Autonomous coding: Making a Python space shooter with Qwen
45:30 Installing DeepSeek V4 locally
49:36 DeepSeek voice dictation & live web search tests
56:04 Integrating ElevenLabs for Text-to-Speech (TTS)
1:00:15 Studio upgrade: How AI leveled up my YouTube setup (LinkedIn article)
1:08:14 Troubleshooting the ElevenLabs API integration
1:14:48 Admin panel: Analytics, chat evaluations & model split-testing
1:18:25 Success: ElevenLabs Text-to-Speech (TTS) works!
1:19:10 Live mobile voice chat demonstration
1:20:25 Outro & ASCII art goodbye 👑 Premium Community: https://mrc.fm/premium

Behind the Storm: Episode 10 Behind the Storm brought to you by @Metro-Elevator is a Carolina Hurricanes documentary that brings you behind the scenes into the world of the NHL team in Raleigh. Follow the Canes through the hockey season and get to know the personalities in the locker room both on and off the ice. 

Episode 10 brings you along for Round 2 of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs as the Canes take on the Flyers. Watch every memorable moment of the Canes' series sweep that led to a historic 8-0 start to the playoffs. Hear from the players who break down the matchup, including the dominance of the Stankoven line and Andersen’s continued success in the crease.

videos.title: The Hidden Cost of Constant Stress
videos.summary_source_text:
The Hidden Cost of Constant Stress Modern life keeps the body stuck in a constant state of stimulation. Endless thoughts, stress, and distraction push the nervous system into fight or flight all day long. Silence and intentional breathing create the opposite effect, allowing the body to shift into a calmer, restorative state. Restoring that calm state may be one of the most important things the body needs today.

videos.title: Learn This Under The Radar Professional Move
videos.summary_source_text:
Learn This Under The Radar Professional Move The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Don’t Keep Your Hands Out Shoot Like This Instead
videos.summary_source_text:
Don’t Keep Your Hands Out Shoot Like This Instead You're seeing the SlingShot right here, and this is the whole point of the system inside the Train 2.0+ membership.

Look where his top hand ends up on the one-timer, basically tucked right into his back hip pocket, almost like he's reaching back to grab his wallet. That pull is where the leverage on the stick comes from, and the leverage is where the mechanical advantage is made.

Most guys grow up being told to push through with the bottom hand and that's where all the focus goes when you're learning how to shoot. But slow down any elite one-timer, Matthews, Ovechkin, Crosby, and the same thing is happening every single time. The top hand is ripping back into the body just as hard as the bottom hand is driving forward, and that opposing pull is what loads the stick into the Sweet Spot Preload.

If your top hand is finishing somewhere out in front of you, the stick is doing almost none of the work for you, and that's most of your shot left on the ice.

#train2point0 #downhillskating #hockeytraining #NHL You're seeing the SlingShot right here, and this is the whole point of the system inside the Train 2.0+ membership.

Look where his top hand ends up on the one-timer, basically tucked right into his back hip pocket, almost like he's reaching back to grab his wallet. That pull is where the leverage on the stick comes from, and the leverage is where the mechanical advantage is made.

Most guys grow up being told to push through with the bottom hand and that's where all the focus goes when you're learning how to shoot. But slow down any elite one-timer, Matthews, Ovechkin, Crosby, and the same thing is happening every single time. The top hand is ripping back into the body just as hard as the bottom hand is driving forward, and that opposing pull is what loads the stick into the Sweet Spot Preload.

If your top hand is finishing somewhere out in front of you, the stick is doing almost none of the work for you, and that's most of your shot left on the ice.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

About Train 2.0:
Train 2.0 is an online hockey development platform founded by Jason Yee: kinesiologist, former professional player, and UBC honors graduate. We give players and coaches a mechanical advantage by reverse-engineering elite NHL movements and making them available to players at every level.

The Recovery Secret No One Talks About (2,000 Years Old) Which is better for recovery, a cold shower or a hot one? In this video, we’ll compare cold vs. hot shower recovery after a workout to see how they stack up. I’ll also share the best recovery method after a workout that many people don’t know about!

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/490AmVn

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

Most people believe cold therapy is the ultimate recovery tool. Ice baths, cold plunges, freezing showers, they’re everywhere. 

When you train, you’re creating stress so your body can adapt, rebuild, and grow stronger. Reducing inflammation too soon may actually slow down muscle recovery and gains.

If you want to recover faster, sleep better, and perform at your peak, this might be the missing piece.

videos.title: Fix Rhomboid Pain Now (Shoulder Blade Knots!)
videos.summary_source_text:
Fix Rhomboid Pain Now (Shoulder Blade Knots!) Have you been dealing with rhomboid pain or shoulder blade pain that feels like a deep knot between your scapulae? In this video, I’m going to show you how to fix rhomboid pain by addressing the real cause of the problem and walking you through 5 moves that can help relieve pain in the upper back, improve thoracic spine mobility, and get your back feeling better fast.

Fix Your Back Pain Here - https://athleanx.com
Subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

Rhomboid pain is one of the most common complaints people have when they feel discomfort in the upper back, especially in that area between the shoulder blade and the spine. Most people assume the problem is the rhomboids itself, so they try to dig into it with a lacrosse ball, massage gun, or endless stretching. The problem is, that usually only gives temporary relief because the rhomboids are often not the true source of the pain.

More often than not, rhomboid pain and upper back pain are symptoms of a bigger issue: poor mobility or dysfunction in the thoracic spine. The thoracic spine is the section of your spine that runs through your upper and mid back. When this area becomes stiff, locked up, or unable to rotate properly, the muscles around it — including the rhomboids, traps, and muscles between the shoulder blades — can start to feel tight, irritated, or painful.

That is why the goal here is not just to stretch the rhomboids. Instead, we need to restore movement to the thoracic spine, get the shoulder blades moving properly, and help the upper back move the way it was designed to move. When you do that, you can finally start to relieve the tension, tightness, and nagging pain between the shoulder blades.

The first move to help fix rhomboid pain is the rhomboid pushup. This is not designed to strengthen the rhomboids in the traditional sense, but rather to take them through a controlled range of motion while mobilizing the thoracic spine and shoulder blades. As you allow your chest to drop toward the floor, the rhomboids contract as the shoulder blades come together. As you push the floor away and protract at the top, the rhomboids are placed on stretch. This helps restore proper scapular movement, which is critical when trying to get rid of upper back pain.

Next is the wall splat. This move is excellent for improving thoracic rotation and addressing stiffness in the upper back. Stand close to a wall, spread your arms wider if needed to avoid shoulder discomfort, and drive your knee toward the wall as you sink your hips deeper into the movement. The key is to let the thoracic spine rotate and open up as you move closer to the wall. You should feel an immediate difference in how your upper back moves, especially if you’ve been dealing with tightness or pain between the shoulder blades.

The third move is a thoracic spine mobilization drill called can openers. Start on your knees and elbows, place one hand behind your head, and rotate your upper back so that your elbow points toward the ceiling. Hold briefly at the top before returning to the starting position and repeating. One important cue here is to actively retract the shoulder blade on the side you are rotating toward. This reinforces proper scapular movement while improving thoracic mobility, both of which are important for fixing rhomboid pain and upper back discomfort.

The fourth move is the 11:15 stretch. This stretch not only feels great, but it also targets the area that often feels locked up when you have rhomboid pain. Get your arms into the proper 11:15 position and focus on reaching long while actively retracting the shoulder blade on the arm in the 15 position. This combination of reach, rotation, and scapular control helps reinforce the mobility you need in the thoracic spine and upper back. If your pain feels like a knot between your shoulder blades, this is one you will likely feel right away.

The final move in this sequence is the bridge and reach over. This is one of the best movements you can do every day to help your body feel better. It mobilizes the thoracic spine, opens up the upper back, and connects the movement of your hips, spine, shoulders, and core. Rather than isolating one small area, this move gets the entire kinetic chain working together. That is important because upper back pain is often not just an upper back problem. It is usually the result of multiple areas failing to move well together.

If you are looking for a complete workout program that helps you build a ripped, athletic body while also addressing the aches, pains, and mobility issues that hold you back, head to athleanx.com using the link below and check out the program selector to find the best program for your goals.

Have you been dealing with rhomboid pain or shoulder blade pain that feels like a deep knot between your scapulae? In this video, I’m going to show you how to fix rhomboid pain by addressing the real cause of the problem and walking you through 5 moves that can help relieve pain in the upper back, improve thoracic spine mobility, and get your back feeling better fast.

Fix Your Back Pain Here - https://athleanx.com
Subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

Rhomboid pain is one of the most common complaints people have when they feel discomfort in the upper back, especially in that area between the shoulder blade and the spine. Most people assume the problem is the rhomboids itself, so they try to dig into it with a lacrosse ball, massage gun, or endless stretching. The problem is, that usually only gives temporary relief because the rhomboids are often not the true source of the pain.

More often than not, rhomboid pain and upper back pain are symptoms of a bigger issue: poor mobility or dysfunction in the thoracic spine. The thoracic spine is the section of your spine that runs through your upper and mid back. When this area becomes stiff, locked up, or unable to rotate properly, the muscles around it — including the rhomboids, traps, and muscles between the shoulder blades — can start to feel tight, irritated, or painful.

That is why the goal here is not just to stretch the rhomboids. Instead, we need to restore movement to the thoracic spine, get the shoulder blades moving properly, and help the upper back move the way it was designed to move. When you do that, you can finally start to relieve the tension, tightness, and nagging pain between the shoulder blades.

The first move to help fix rhomboid pain is the rhomboid pushup. This is not designed to strengthen the rhomboids in the traditional sense, but rather to take them through a controlled range of motion while mobilizing the thoracic spine and shoulder blades. As you allow your chest to drop toward the floor, the rhomboids contract as the shoulder blades come together. As you push the floor away and protract at the top, the rhomboids are placed on stretch. This helps restore proper scapular movement, which is critical when trying to get rid of upper back pain.

Next is the wall splat. This move is excellent for improving thoracic rotation and addressing stiffness in the upper back. Stand close to a wall, spread your arms wider if needed to avoid shoulder discomfort, and drive your knee toward the wall as you sink your hips deeper into the movement. The key is to let the thoracic spine rotate and open up as you move closer to the wall. You should feel an immediate difference in how your upper back moves, especially if you’ve been dealing with tightness or pain between the shoulder blades.

The third move is a thoracic spine mobilization drill called can openers. Start on your knees and elbows, place one hand behind your head, and rotate your upper back so that your elbow points toward the ceiling. Hold briefly at the top before returning to the starting position and repeating. One important cue here is to actively retract the shoulder blade on the side you are rotating toward. This reinforces proper scapular movement while improving thoracic mobility, both of which are important for fixing rhomboid pain and upper back discomfort.

The fourth move is the 11:15 stretch. This stretch not only feels great, but it also targets the area that often feels locked up when you have rhomboid pain. Get your arms into the proper 11:15 position and focus on reaching long while actively retracting the shoulder blade on the arm in the 15 position. This combination of reach, rotation, and scapular control helps reinforce the mobility you need in the thoracic spine and upper back. If your pain feels like a knot between your shoulder blades, this is one you will likely feel right away.

The final move in this sequence is the bridge and reach over. This is one of the best movements you can do every day to help your body feel better. It mobilizes the thoracic spine, opens up the upper back, and connects the movement of your hips, spine, shoulders, and core. Rather than isolating one small area, this move gets the entire kinetic chain working together. That is important because upper back pain is often not just an upper back problem. It is usually the result of multiple areas failing to move well together.

videos.title: You’ve Been Lied To About the Clubface - It's Not Square!
videos.summary_source_text:
You’ve Been Lied To About the Clubface - It's Not Square! HackMotion - https://hackmotion.com/affiliates/chrisryan/?aff=121&utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=chrisryan&utm_content=pp&utm_term=18_05_2026

Most golfers are told that the clubface should be “square” at the top of the backswing.

But here’s the truth… it isn’t.

In every golf swing, the clubface naturally rotates open by around 90 degrees during the backswing. The position we often call “square” is actually open relative to the target, and understanding this is a huge step toward controlling your ball striking.

The real challenge in golf isn’t just getting the club to the top — it’s how the face closes again during the downswing.

In this video I’ll show you:

• Why the clubface opens in every backswing
• Why the “square at the top” idea confuses so many golfers
• How great players manage the clubface in transition
• Why most golfers struggle to control the face through impact
• What you can do to improve your strike and face control

Once you understand how the clubface really behaves in the swing, a lot of the confusion around ball striking starts to disappear.

videos.title: The Bladed Iron Myth: You Can’t Feel Anything (And You’re Paying For It)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Bladed Iron Myth: You Can’t Feel Anything (And You’re Paying For It) Golfers spend thousands chasing that elusive "buttery soft" forged iron feel, but are you just falling for a massive golf equipment myth? In this video, we strip away the big-brand marketing to find out whether there is actually a difference between forged blades and cavity-back irons, or if you are paying for an illusion. 

We took 30 golfers, from 20+ handicappers to scratch pros, and put them through a strict blind test with no vision or sound to isolate the true feel of a golf club. The results are eye-opening and might completely change how you buy golf clubs.

0:00 - The Elusive "Buttery Soft" Iron Feel
1:02 - The Blindfolded & Sound-Isolated Test
2:14 - Why Blades vs Cavity Backs Are Made Differently
3:02 - The Shocking Test Results (80% Failed)
4:15 - What Forced Guessing Revealed
5:20 - The Truth About "Feel" vs "Sound"
6:10 - How to Choose Your Next Set of Irons

videos.title: När ska vi releasa klubban…
videos.channel: Bättre & Enklare golf med Marcus Edblad PGA
videos.summary_source_text:
När ska vi releasa klubban… Vi behöver ofta veta när vi ska göra saker och inte bara hur vi ska göra. Strunta i vad du kallar slaget eller releasen av klubban. Förstå istället när du ska göra det. #golf #golftips #golflife 

0:00 Intro till när vi ska release klubban. 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook. Vi behöver ofta veta när vi ska göra saker och inte bara hur vi ska göra. Strunta i vad du kallar slaget eller releasen av klubban. Förstå istället när du ska göra det. #golf #golftips #golflife
